title: Traditional Saudi Lamb Kebabs
description: A classic dish from Saudi Arabia, these lamb kebabs are marinated in a blend of spices and cooked to perfection. Serve with a side of rice or flatbread for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: lamb
ingredients.notes: leg of lamb or lamb shoulder

instructions: 1. In a small bowl, mix together the Saudi and arabian spice blends.
2. Trim any excess fat from the lamb and cut it into 1-inch cubes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the lamb cubes, Saudi-arabian spice blend, and black pepper. Mix well to coat the lamb evenly.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the lamb to marinate.
5. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers.
6. Brush the grill or grill pan with olive oil to prevent sticking.
7. Grill the lamb kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until cooked through.
8. Serve the lamb kebabs hot with a side of rice or flatbread.
9. Garnish with fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro, if desired.
